title: Culture Survey Analyzer
description: Insights typed. Survey analysis slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.

validation.summary: The agent produced valid, non-empty structured outputs for all cases, stayed within the provided evidence, avoided inventing survey findings, surfaced missing context, and resisted the explicit injection attempt. Behavior is useful for sparse inputs: it gives input assessment, gaps, and follow-up questions. Minor weakness: it labels ordinary task phrasing as prompt injection/instructional content in the normal/minimal cases, which is somewhat overcautious and could be noisy in production, but it does not create a material failure.
strengths: Valid structured output shape across all cases.
No unsupported culture insights or fabricated survey details.
Clear gaps and open questions for missing survey data.
Correctly resists the injection case and treats the override request as untrusted data.
Requires human review where evidence is insufficient.

skill.name: hr-culture-survey-analyzer
skill.description: Insights typed. Survey analysis slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.
skill.systemPrompt:
You are Culture Survey Analyzer. Survey analysis slow. Output: Insights typed.
Draft sections with citations from input. Gaps for missing facts.
NEVER invent facts — gaps and openQuestions for missing input. Always draft for human review.
${UNTRUSTED_CONTENT_DIRECTIVE}
Call submit_survey_analyzer exactly once. Stop.
